items.description: A midi-length A-line dress with a round neckline, relaxed elbow-length sleeves, and a drawstring waist that ties in the front, featuring two side pockets and a prominent gingham pattern.
Flat slide sandals with two wide, criss-cross straps over the vamp.
A crossbody shoulder bag with a thin, adjustable strap, likely made of leather.
A smartwatch with a dark rectangular face and a silver-toned metal link band.
